name: book-translation
tagline: Guides translating 'The Interactive Book of Prompting' chapters and UI strings into a new locale using the Turkish folder as a base.
verdict: No security concerns. But the skill contradicts itself: Step 1 says copy the Turkish folder as base, yet its own commands and the later 'Recommended Workflow' section copy the English files instead — two agents following it could produce different results. Locale registration isn't re-run-safe (duplicate imports on repeat), there's no handling for a failing.

highlights.summary: Description states the task (translate the book) but never phrases when/how a dispatching agent should trigger it.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the description or body.

Step 1 says 'Copy Turkish Folder as Base... instead of translating from English', but its own commands copy `src/content/book/*.mdx` and `locales/en.ts` (English), and the later 'Recommended Workflow'
